name: SKRR Exploration Inc.
summary: SKRR Exploration Inc. operates as a precious metal explorer. The company explores for gold deposits. Its projects include Irving, Leland, Olson, Ithingo, and Cathro projects located in Saskatchewan. The company was formerly known as Canex Energy Corp. and changed its name to SKRR Exploration Inc. in January 2020. SKRR Exploration Inc. was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
